name: libnss-systemd
title: libnss-systemd
summary: nss module providing dynamic user and group name resolution
description:
nss module providing dynamic user and group name resolution
nss-systemd is a plug-in module for the GNU Name Service Switch (NSS)
functionality of the GNU C Library (glibc), providing UNIX user and group name
resolution for dynamic users and groups allocated through the DynamicUser=
option in systemd unit files. See systemd.exec(5) for details on this
option.
.
Installing this package automatically adds the module to /etc/nsswitch.conf.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libnss-systemd because nss module providing dynamic user and group name resolution.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libnss-systemd as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libnss-systemd with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libnss-systemd --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
